emails.subject: Re: Meeting Requested
emails.body: Re: Meeting Requested Kevin, Let's meet for lunch next week (Monday of Friday would be best). We can talk about the project and decide who has the right skills to help you. The person who supports EBS is Stinson Gibner and his lead person is Martin Lin. My secretary's number is 3-5290 (Shirley Crenshaw). Vince
